Department of Electronics and Telecommunication**
Electronics and Telecommunication department has recently opened in Women's Polytechnic with an intake capacity of 30 students per year.
**Faculties:-**
| 1.**Sri Bappaditya Sarkar, HOD (i/c)
** |

| Designation | Lecturer (Senior Scale) | |
| Qualification | B. Tech (Electronics and Telecommunication) |
| Areas of Interest | Analog communication, wireless communication, Optical fibre communication |
| Email: | bappastar@gmail.com |
| Contact: | 986212289 |
| ** 2.Smt. Purniya Jamatia ** |
| Designation | Lecturer | |
| Qualification | B.E in Electronics and Telecommunication, M.Tech in Microwave and Optical Communication, NET qualified |
| Areas of Interest | Optical communication, Digital Electronics, Optoelectronics |
| Email: | purnia.jmt@gmail.com |
| Contact: | 7005366217 |
| ** 3.Sri Bhaskar Das ** |
| Designation | Lecturer | |
| Qualification | B.Tech in Electronics and Communication Engineering, M.Tech in Communication Engineering, Gate qualified |
| Areas of Interest | Analog and Digital Communication , Digital Electronics, Signals and Systems, Control Systems, Electronic Device and Circuit, Network Theory Processing |
| Email: | bdacc2020@gmail.com |
| Contact: | 8415898957 |
| ** 4.Smt. Piu Das ** |
| Designation | Guest Lecturer | |
| Qualification | B.Tech (ETCE), M.Tech (ETCE) |
| Areas of Interest | Digital Electronics, Electronic Device and Circuit |
| Email: | piudas422@gmail.com |
| Contact: | |
